message:
test(sync): add and refine notify lost-wakeup regression tests

notify_bug_test.rs:
- Add notify_one_not_consumed_by_broadcasted_waiter test that
  directly exercises the reordered poll_init fast paths. Creates
  a waiter before a broadcast, issues notify_one, then
  notify_waiters, and verifies the first waiter completes via
  the generation check while leaving the stored token intact for
  a second waiter created after the broadcast. This is the
  canonical regression test for the ordering fix in notify.rs.

notify_bug.rs:
- Simplify NoopWaker implementation (remove redundant wake_by_ref
  override) and clean up formatting for consistency with the rest
  of the test suite. No behavioral changes to existing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
